module.name: pinstore
module.spec: FilePinStore.Load reads drift.pin from disk, unmarshals XML into Specs, Markers, Links, and ResolutionState, and returns the PinState. If the file does not exist, it returns ErrPinNotFound.

FilePinStore.Save marshals PinState to indented XML and writes it to drift.pin, truncating any existing file. The XML root element is drift with nested specs, markers, links, and resolutions sections.
When drift.pin does not exist on disk, Load returns ErrPinNotFound, prompting the user to run drift init first.
